text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
The trainees who entrust their feelings 
to the training trainee are known 
as successor trainees.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
Once you have completed your training and 
had your trainee registered in the 
Hall of Fame, you will be able to select her 
as a successor.
color_text_info_list:
registered in the 
Hall of Fame

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
Depending on the trainee's factors and 
feelings, you can receive various benefits, 
such as improving starting stats and 
acquiring new skills.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
Even if you choose her as a successor, 
you won't lose that trainee, 
so don't be worried!
